name: Sant'Emiliano Classico
descShort: Smooth and buttery with notes of fresh-cut grass, sweet almond, and a gentle peppery finish. Our everyday essential.
descLong: Our signature blend, crafted from a careful selection of Moraiolo, Frantoio, and Leccino olives harvested at peak ripeness from our family grove in the Trevi valley. Smooth and buttery on the palate, with delicate notes of fresh-cut grass, sweet almond, and a pleasingly gentle peppery finish. Versatile enough for everything from salad dressings to a simple drizzle over bread — this is the oil we reach for every single day.

highlights.label: Aroma
highlights.title: Fresh Grass & Almond
highlights.text: Clean, inviting scent of freshly cut grass with a warm undertone of sweet almond.

highlights.label: Palate
highlights.title: Buttery & Smooth
highlights.text: A soft, round texture with a clean buttery quality that coats the palate gently.

highlights.label: Finish
highlights.title: Gentle Pepper
highlights.text: A subtle, pleasing warmth at the back of the throat — the hallmark of a quality extra virgin.

name: Sant'Emiliano Fresco
descShort: Vibrant and intensely fruity — early-harvest green olives give this oil bold aromas of artichoke, fresh herbs, and tomato leaf.
descLong: Made exclusively from Moraiolo olives picked in the very first days of October — before the fruit fully ripens, when polyphenol levels are at their highest. The result is an intensely vibrant oil that bursts with aromas of fresh artichoke, tomato leaf, and cut herbs, followed by a bold, lasting pepper on the finish. This is a connoisseur's oil: powerful enough to transform a simple bruschetta, yet complex enough to appreciate on its own. Every batch is limited to the yield of a single early picking.

highlights.label: Aroma
highlights.title: Artichoke & Tomato Leaf
highlights.text: Intensely green and vegetal — the unmistakable scent of freshly pressed early-harvest olives.

highlights.label: Palate
highlights.title: Vibrant & Fruity
highlights.text: Bright, lively fruitiness with a rich texture and clean, fresh herb character throughout.

highlights.label: Finish
highlights.title: Bold Pepper
highlights.text: A long, assertive peppery warmth — a sign of the high polyphenol content in early-harvest oil.

name: Sant'Emiliano Intenso
descShort: Our boldest oil — a powerful, complex flavor with intense fruitiness and a long, warming finish. Ideal for raw use on grilled meats and soups.
descLong: Made entirely from 100% Moraiolo olives, a variety renowned across Umbria for its bold, assertive character. Pressed from olives harvested slightly later in the season when the fruit is at its most complex, Intenso delivers a rich, layered flavor of wild herbs, ripe olive fruit, and dark spice, followed by a long, warming finish that lingers on the palate. Designed for use raw — a drizzle over a ribollita, grilled bistecca, or a plate of aged pecorino transforms the dish entirely.

specs.label: Best Used For
specs.value: Grilled meats, soups, aged cheese, raw finishing

highlights.label: Aroma
highlights.title: Wild Herbs & Olive Fruit
highlights.text: Deep, earthy aromas of wild rosemary, sage, and ripe olive fruit with a hint of dark spice.

highlights.label: Palate
highlights.title: Complex & Full-Bodied
highlights.text: Rich and layered — a powerful fruitiness with a round, dense texture that commands attention.

highlights.label: Finish
highlights.title: Long Warming Heat
highlights.text: A sustained, warming pepper that unfolds slowly — a finish that lingers long after the last bite.

name: Sant'Emiliano Classico 1L
descShort: Our classic blend in a larger format — ideal for passionate home cooks who use olive oil daily. Best value per milliliter.
descLong: Everything you love about our Classico — the same smooth, buttery blend of Moraiolo, Frantoio, and Leccino olives from our Trevi valley grove — in a larger format made for kitchens that take olive oil seriously. If you cook daily and refuse to compromise on quality, this is the bottle for you. At $48 per litre it represents our best value per millilitre, and with a properly sealed bottle stored away from heat and light, it stays fresh for up to 18 months. Stock up once, cook well all year.

highlights.label: Best Value
highlights.title: $4.80 per 100ml
highlights.text: The lowest cost per millilitre across our range — the smart choice for daily cooking without compromise.

highlights.label: Same Quality
highlights.title: Identical Oil, Larger Format
highlights.text: Exactly the same blend as our 500ml Classico — cold-pressed from the same harvest, same grove, same standard.

highlights.label: Long Shelf Life
highlights.title: Stays Fresh up to 18 Months
highlights.text: Properly sealed and stored away from light and heat, this bottle stays at its best for up to 18 months.

name: The Umbria Trio
descShort: Three 250ml bottles — Classico, Fresco, and Intenso — in a handcrafted wooden gift box. A taste of Umbria, beautifully presented.
descLong: Three distinct expressions of our Trevi valley grove, each telling a different part of the same story. The Umbria Trio brings together 250ml bottles of our Classico, Fresco, and Intenso — the full range of what Umbrian olive oil can be — presented in a handcrafted wooden box with a personal card. It is the gift we would want to receive ourselves: beautiful, meaningful, and utterly delicious. Whether for a passionate cook, a curious food lover, or someone who simply deserves something exceptional, this is Umbria in a box.

highlights.label: Included
highlights.title: Classico — The Everyday
highlights.text: Smooth, buttery, and versatile. Notes of fresh grass and almond with a gentle pepper finish.

highlights.label: Included
highlights.title: Fresco — The Bold
highlights.text: Intensely green and vibrant. Early-harvest Moraiolo with artichoke, fresh herbs, and assertive pepper.

highlights.label: Included
highlights.title: Intenso — The Robust
highlights.text: Powerful and complex. Wild herbs, full-bodied fruitiness, and a long warming finish for raw finishing.

name: Monthly Harvest Box
descShort: Receive a 500ml bottle of our seasonal selection every month. Pause or cancel any time. Never run out of great olive oil again.
descLong: Each month we select the oil best suited to the season — a different expression, a different story, always from our grove in Umbria. Some months it will be the smooth everyday Classico; others, a limited-batch early harvest or a special reserve we've been keeping back. You'll receive a 500ml bottle with a short note explaining the oil, the harvest conditions, and our suggestion for how to use it. No long commitments — pause or cancel any time from your account. This is the easiest way to keep your kitchen stocked with genuinely great olive oil.

specs.label: Commitment
specs.value: None — pause or cancel any time

highlights.label: Step 1
highlights.title: Subscribe Today
highlights.text: Sign up once and your first 500ml bottle ships within a few days. No long-form commitment required.

highlights.label: Step 2
highlights.title: Receive Monthly
highlights.text: A fresh bottle arrives every month with a tasting card about the oil, its harvest, and our serving suggestions.

highlights.label: Flexible
highlights.title: Pause or Cancel Anytime
highlights.text: Going away? Stocked up? Pause or cancel with a single click — no questions, no penalties, no minimum term.
